mapper.select: SELECT email, nickname, password, provider_code, provider_id, profile_image_url, user_status_code, CASE role_code WHEN '01' THEN 'USER' WHEN '02' THEN 'ADMIN' END AS role_code, fcm_token, terms_agreed_yn, privacy_agreed_yn, terms_agreed_at AS termsAgreedAt, created_at AS createdAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
